form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 365m. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 365m at this track behind Donna Don't Stop beaten 0.8 lengths (20.96). The form from her last run is stacking up nicely. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 365m boxes hit the rail and shifted out, losing momentum.

form.formComment: On debut at this trip. Last start finished sixth at this track over 365m in (21.41). Worth serious consideration.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 525m at Wagga beaten 4.5 lengths (30.87) behind Paw Colten in a Grade 5 on March 13. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a eighth (37.71) in a MX at this track and returns after a ten weeks break. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.57) when fourth over 472m at Bulli in a Grade 5. Starts from box 8 for the first time here. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
